concerns.text: Data model defines 4 engagement items (engagement_item_1 through engagement_item_4), but contracts/dataset.schema.yaml only requires 3 (engagement_item_1, engagement_item_2, engagement_item_3). Plan Phase 2 FR-004 references 4 proxy items (membership, extension, collective action, knowledge exchange) matching data model, but contract schema is inconsistent. Align contract to require all 4 items or update data model to 3.

Plan does not explicitly reference the schema contract files (contracts/dataset.schema.yaml, contracts/results.schema.yaml). While FR-002 validates variables and outputs match results schema, the plan should cite the contract files to establish formal validation linkage. Add 'See contracts/dataset.schema.yaml' to FR-002 and 'See contracts/results.schema.yaml' to Phase 3 outputs.
